description_long: This object is a stylized rifle resembling the iconic AK-47, featuring a robust black receiver and a prominent curved magazine in a reddish-brown color. The stock is angular and solid, matching the receiver in color and material, and the grip is ergonomically shaped in a grayish tone. The handguard area includes a set of brown panels, likely for heat shielding or grip enhancement. The barrel is relatively short and ends with a simple muzzle, while the iron sights are visible at both the front and rear. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal decorative elements, emphasizing function and durability.
description: A stylized AK-47-style rifle with a black receiver, brown curved magazine, and angular stock, featuring iron sights and a simple muzzle.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile of the rifle, including the curved magazine, angular stock, and handguard details.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the barrel, front sight, and the narrow profile of the stock and receiver.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the magazine curve, stock, and grip, mirroring the main features from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear-on view focusing on the back of the stock and the alignment of the receiver and barrel.
